description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open. Using the dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx, create a workbook named 'Customer_Segmentation_Analysis'. Segment customers by total 'Sales' into a custom calculation named 'Customer Tier' with categories: 'Gold' (Sales > 5,000), 'Silver' (Sales 1,000-5,000), and 'Bronze' (Sales < 1,000). Create a Bar Chart showing the count of customers for each 'Customer Tier', ensuring the bars are sorted logically by value (e.g., Bronze, Silver, Gold) rather than alphabetically.
